title: SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND SENIOR COMMUNITY SERVICE EMPLOYMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Assists those who seek employment, training assistance, and social engagement. Offers training assignments to develop current employment skills, resume and cover letter education, job readiness classes, and individual employment plans. 237 NE Broadway Street Suite 100 Portland, OR 97232 Eligibility: -Ages 55 and older, unemployed, and income for the last 6 months must be below 125% of the federal poverty guidelines. Social Security benefits and some other incomes do not count towards income. -Be unemployed and willing to obtain competitive employment -Priority given to veterans, spouses of veterans, homeless or at-risk of becoming homeless, and people with disabilities Hours: Monday-Thursday 8:30am-5pm, Friday 8:30am-4:30pm Email (503) 222-8500 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 222-8500 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: -Call for information -Complete application -A waiting list may be maintained by the county of residence. As positions open, applicants will be called to complete paperwork. Completion of eligibility paperwork does not guarantee enrollment into the program. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income, ID or birth certificate, Social Security card AREA SERVED: Baker, Benton, Clackamas, Clatsop, Columbia, Coos, Crook, Curry, Deschutes, Douglas, Grant, Hood River, Jackson, Jefferson, Josephine, Klamath, Lake, Lane, Lincoln, Linn, Malheur, Marion, Morrow, Multnomah, Polk, Tillamook, Umatilla, Union, Wallowa, Wasco, Washington, Wheeler, and Yamhill Counties Services: Comprehensive Job Assistance Centers * Older Adults Senior Community Service Employment Programs Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - EASTERSEALS OREGON EMPLOYMENT - CONNECTING COMMUNITIES PROGRAM EMPLOYMENT - HOMELESS VETERAN REINTEGRATION PROGRAM LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - OREGON SUMMER DAY CAMP LEISURE ACTIVITIES/RECREATION - RESIDENTIAL SUMMER CAMP AT EVANS CREEK RETREAT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EASTERSEALS OREGON PORTLAND
